change_summary: Added shared production trailing partial-reduce policy, delegated preflight reduce sizing to it, added opt-in BacktestEngine replay via --replay-partial-reduces, documented parity contract, and recorded fixed-window replay diagnostics. Replay-on produced 15 partial reductions and was worse than baseline across fixed windows: EV delta sum -0.3136, PnL delta -9441.76.
component: quant/production_parity.py, quant/preflight_validator.py, quant/backtester.py, quant/test_production_parity.py, docs/production_backtest_parity.md, quant/experiments/exp-20260429-011_trailing_partial_reduce_parity.py, data/experiments/exp-20260429-011/exp-20260429-011_trailing_partial_reduce_parity.json, docs/experiments/tickets/exp-20260429-012.json, docs/experiments/logs/exp-20260429-012.json, docs/experiment_registry.json, docs/experiment_log.jsonl
hypothesis: Production trailing-stop partial-reduce advice must use the same shared policy as BacktestEngine replay so the mechanism is measurable and cannot drift silently.

locked_variables: shared trailing partial-reduce policy and replay switch
parameters.single_causal_variable: shared trailing partial-reduce policy and replay switch
